title: Airbus A320 web reference source discovery seed

webSourceLeads.intendedUse: Airbus cockpit commonality, fly-by-wire philosophy, and first-pass A320-family cockpit language.
webSourceLeads.downloadPolicy: Do not download media from this page unless a separate source record confirms use rights.
webSourceLeads.limitations: Manufacturer page is broad cockpit/commonality context, not a complete A320 modeling board.

webSourceLeads.intendedUse: Find cockpit-section candidates with explicit license pages, author attribution, and file history.
webSourceLeads.downloadPolicy: Inspect each file license and source provenance before adding a manifest entry or downloading.
webSourceLeads.limitations: Category includes mixed operators, A320-family variants, simulator views, in-flight views, and non-modeling viewpoints.

webSourceLeads.intendedUse: Possible presentation benchmark for general A320-family glass cockpit layout after license review.
webSourceLeads.downloadPolicy: Treat as simulator/photo candidate only; record CC BY 2.0 attribution if used.
webSourceLeads.limitations: Simulator cockpit, not real aircraft geometry authority.

webSourceLeads.intendedUse: Candidate real A320 cockpit visual reference if license, operator, and cockpit section metadata validate.
webSourceLeads.downloadPolicy: Inspect the file page, source, author, and license before manifesting or downloading.
webSourceLeads.limitations: Must confirm exact cockpit applicability and whether the image can support geometry, material, or presentation only.

webSourceLeads.intendedUse: Panel naming and orientation aid for source triage only.
webSourceLeads.downloadPolicy: Do not use images as production reference without license review.
webSourceLeads.limitations: Simulator/add-on documentation; not production geometry authority.
